zh.lifeSummary: 當John Washborne於1566年8月1日出生在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯時，他的父親John Washborne49歲，母親Jone Shepey26歲。他於1596年7月6日與Martha Timbrell在英國武斯特斯爾本沃斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1624年8月4日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾本沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Washborne于1566年8月1日出生在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯时，他的父亲John Washborne49岁，母亲Jone Shepey26岁。他于1596年7月6日与Martha Timbrell在英国武斯特斯爾本沃斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1624年8月4日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾本沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Washborne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Washburn
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Washbourne (Gloucestershire), or Washbourne in Halwell (Devon). The Gloucestershire placename derives from Old English wæsse (genitive wæssan) ‘wet place, swamp, marsh’ + burna ‘spring, stream’. The Devon placename derives from Old English wæsce ‘place for washing’ + burna.
History: John Washburn came to MA in 1626 and settled in Duxbury, MA, in 1632.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When John Washborne was born on 1 August 1566, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, his father, John Washborne, was 49 and his mother, Jone Shepey, was 26. He married Martha Timbrell on 6 July 1596, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 4 August 1624, in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Washborne est né le 1 août 1566, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Washborne, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Jone Shepey, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Martha Timbrell le 6 juillet 1596, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 août 1624, à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Washborne am 1. August 1566 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Washborne 49 und seine Mutter Jone Shepey 26. Er hat am 6. Juli 1596 in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England Martha Timbrell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. August 1624 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborne è nato il il 1 agosto 1566 nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England, il suo padre, John Washborne, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Jone Shepey, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Martha Timbrell il 6 luglio 1596, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 agosto 1624, nel Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Washborneが1566年8月1日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで生まれた時，父John Washborneは49歳，母Jone Shepeyは26歳であった。1596年7月6日にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスでMartha Timbrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1624年8月4日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアベンジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Washborne(이)가 1566년 8월 1일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Washborne(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Jone Shepey(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1596년 7월 6일 영국 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 Martha Timbrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1624년 8월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 벤그워스에 묻혔다.

pt.1 August 1566–4 August 1624: 1 de agosto de 1566–4 de agosto de 1624
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Washborne nasceu em 1 de agosto de 1566, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Washborne, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Jone Shepey, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Martha Timbrell em 6 de julho de 1596, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de agosto de 1624, em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Washborne родился 1 августа 1566 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Washborne было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Jone Shepey, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Martha Timbrell 6 июля 1596 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 августа 1624 г. в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности бенгюорт, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.1 August 1566–4 August 1624: 1 de agosto de 1566–4 de agosto de 1624
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Washborne nació el 1 de agosto de 1566, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Washborne, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Jone Shepey, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Martha Timbrell el 6 de julio de 1596, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de agosto de 1624, en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Bengeworth, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
